title: Experiment Result
description: Logged outcome of a completed experiment, including winner determination.

id.description: Unique identifier for this result record (e.g. 'res-001').

experiment_id.description: ID of the experiment that produced this result.

client_id.description: Client this result is associated with.

outcome.description: Plain-language summary of what happened in the experiment.

data_summary.description: Quantitative or qualitative summary of the collected data.

winner.description: True if this experiment met the winning threshold and should be promoted.

confidence.description: Confidence score between 0.0 and 1.0 for the result conclusion.

notes.description: Additional analyst notes or caveats about this result.

status.description: Review status of this result record.

recorded_on.description: ISO 8601 date the result was recorded (YYYY-MM-DD).
